articles.title: Banking reform ahead? Centre likely to revisit 26% voting rights cap for private shareholders
articles.description: The Indian government is likely to set up a high-level committee to review the 26% voting rights cap on private shareholders in banks under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.

articles.title: 8th Pay Commission memorandum deadline: NC-JCM highlights website glitches faced by employee unions, seeks extension of submission date
articles.description: Central government employee bodies, including NC-JCM and AIDEF, are facing technical issues while submitting memorandums for the 8th Pay Commission, prompting requests for a deadline extension to May 31, 2026. The 8th Pay Commission, however, is currently sticking to its April 30 deadline, despite reported website glitches.

articles.title: US Stocks: Blockchain billionaire Sun takes Trump family’s crypto firm to court

articles.title: Tech Mahindra declares Rs 36/share final dividend; sets July 3 as record date
articles.description: Tech Mahindra's board has proposed a final dividend of Rs 36 per share for FY26, bringing the total payout to Rs 51. This comes as the IT giant reported a strong March quarter with net profit up 16% year-on-year. Shareholders will vote on the dividend at the upcoming AGM, with July 3 set as the record date.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 16% YoY to Rs 1,354 crore, revenue up 13%; co declares Rs 36/share dividend
articles.description: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: Tech Mahindra reported a 16% year-on-year increase in net profit to Rs 1,354 crore for the March quarter, with revenue rising 13% to Rs 15,076 crore. The company is accelerating its AI-led transition, achieving its highest deal wins in recent years and declaring a record total dividend of Rs 51 per share for FY26.

articles.title: It's not just war that brought rupee down, it needs better support
articles.description: The West Asia conflict has accelerated INR depreciation, necessitating a rethink of India's economic fundamentals. Short-term measures include raising domestic interest rates and equalizing onshore tax regulations for asset classes. Longer-term, building world-class universities, encouraging local tourism, and potentially redesigning the INR symbol are proposed to foster resilience and economic growth.

articles.title: From Corpus to Cash Flow: Picking the right mutual fund withdrawal strategy
articles.description: ​Financial planners say there are two broad approaches. One is valuation-based, where investors redeem or book profits when markets appear expensive and then use or redeploy the proceeds. The other is to set up a systematic withdrawal plan (SWP), which allows investors to withdraw a fixed amount at regular intervals, typically on a pre-defined date each month. To meet this payout, the fund house redeems the required number of units based on the prevailing NAV, while the remaining corpus continues to stay invested.

articles.title: Sunteck Realty posts 34% growth in FY26 net profit, revenue up 32%
articles.description: Sunteck Realty has announced a significant 34% jump in net profit for the financial year 2025-26, reaching Rs 202 crore. This strong performance was fueled by robust sales momentum and steady margins. Revenue also saw a substantial increase of 32% for the full year. The company's operational pre-sales grew by 25% annually.

articles.title: Bollywood crime drama ‘Dastaar’ filmed in UK brings £1.2m boost to local economy
articles.description: A Hindi crime drama, Dastaar, filmed extensively in Hull, UK, injected over £1.2 million into the local economy. The production, inspired by Sikh immigrant experiences in 1980s Britain, employed 130 crew members and utilized local resources. This significant investment highlights Hull's growing potential as a filming destination, with hopes to foster local film industry infrastructure.

articles.title: Jordon Hudson takes major step with Bill Belichick trademarks, leaving his family and friends deeply concerned
articles.description: Jordon Hudson has filed trademarks linked to Bill Belichick through her company, raising fresh concerns among his friends and family. Reports from WRAL and The New York Post say people close to the NFL coach are uneasy about her growing influence. With multiple applications already filed, this move could deepen tensions around their widely discussed relationship.
